title: Forty-two new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta March 4
summary: On March 4, YKHC reports forty-two new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. New COVID-19 Cases The 42 are residents in: Akiachak (5) Aniak (2) Bethel (4) Chefornak (4) Chevak (3) Eek (3) Emmonak (4) Hooper Bay (2) Kalskag (1) Kipnuk (2) Kwethluk (4) Newtok (4) Quinhagak (1) St. Mary’s (3) — COVID-19 U...
